# RecentItemsManager

Access via `client.NewClient().RecentItems`.

## List

`GET /recent_items`

| Parameter | In | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| `fields` | query | `[]string` | no |
| `limit` | query | `int64` | no |
| `marker` | query | `string` | no |

**Returns:** `RecentItems`

**Example**

```go
for item, err := range client.RecentItems.List(context.Background(), nil) {
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	fmt.Println(item)
}
```

Paginated — `List(...)` returns `iter.Seq2[*T, error]`, threading the cursor for you. See the [pagination guide](../pagination.md).
